title: Hunting Overlook

The events of that film take place in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', meaning that all [[Painting/Legends|paintings]] in "Celestia Galactica Photografica," including ''Hunting Overlook'', must have been created after [[104 ABY]].</ref>
|media type=[[Painting/Legends|Painting]]<ref name="CGP">{{StoryCite|story=Celestia Galactica Photografica|book=Star Wars: Visionaries}}</ref>

'''''Hunting Overlook''''' was a [[Painting/Legends|painting]]<ref name="CGP" /> created after [[104 ABY]]<ref name="Date" /> that depicted a landing platform overlooking a massive [[Wroshyr tree/Legends|wroshyr tree]] on top of a large body of [[Water/Legends|water]]<ref name="CGP" /> on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. The [[Tree/Legends|tree]] had numerous huts and platforms carved throughout its trunk and branches. [[Starship/Legends|Starships]] were parked on several of its platforms, including two [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] and a [[J-type diplomatic barge/Legends|J-type diplomatic barge]] on the painting's right side. On the platform in the painting's foreground, five [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] and an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] worked on two [[Raddaugh Gnasp fluttercraft/Legends|Raddaugh Gnasp fluttercraft]].<ref name="CGP" />

On the right side of the image, a group of four [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighters]] with brightly [[Color/Legends|colored]] stripes on their [[Hull/Legends|hull]] flew toward the wroshyr tree. The left side of the painting included a large aquatic [[Worm/Legends|worm]]-like creature, with several fluttercraft flying in the [[Atmosphere/Legends|air]] above it. The center of the image featured a large floating structure, with several platforms standing above the water below it.<ref name="CGP" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Green Coruscant'' appeared in "[[Celestia Galactica Photografica]]," a series of [[in-universe]] illustrations by [[Ryan Church]] collected in the [[2005]] graphic novel ''[[Star Wars: Visionaries]]''.<ref name="CGP" />
